vllm.title: [core][distributed] exact ray placement control
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: this is a feature request from the RLHF community, to allow fine-grained control of placement of vLLM workers. It allows vLLM worker to share GPUs with another Ray actor (potentially vLLM workers, but can also be another training worker process).

vllm.title: [Kernel] Use self.kv_cache and forward_context.attn_metadata in Attention.forward
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR does the following things:

Use self.kv_cache instead of getting attn object from forward_context and access attn object's kv_cache attribute . This can avoid unnecessary torch.compile guards as mentioned in #12410
Remove the direct access of attn_metadata in dynamic kv cache scale.
Add note

vllm.title: [Hardware][Intel-Gaudi] Enable FusedSDPA support for Intel Gaudi (HPU)
vllm.author: scsudhak-intel
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FusedSDPA is a Gaudi specific implementation of flash attention. https://docs.habana.ai/en/v1.19.1/PyTorch/Model_Optimization_PyTorch/Optimization_in_PyTorch_Models.html
This PR enables support for FusedSDPA in Intel Gaudi accelerators.

vllm.title: Add: Support for Sparse24Bitmask Compressed Models
vllm.author: rahul-tuli
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds support for models compressed using Sparse24BitMaskCompressor to use cutlass 2:4 Kernels

Adds support for compressed cases

This diff was manually tested on:

nm-testing/SparseLlama-3.1-8B-gsm8k-pruned.2of4-chnl_wts_per_tok_dyn_act_fp8-BitM
nm-testing/SparseLlama-3.1-8B-gsm8k-pruned.2o

vllm.title: [VLM] Use shared field to pass token ids to model
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Some other changes:

Clean up how field elements are being constructed from the config.
Add more documentation to MultiModalFieldElem and BaseMultiModalField.
Add a simple example for each field type demonstrating when to use it.

vllm.title: [Docs] Drop duplicate [source] links
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
A prior change, #10672, added new [source] links for github. The old
links were left in place to ensure that that new github links were
working well before we removed them.
The github links seem to be working well, so we can now remove the
links to custom HTML pages of source code.

vllm.title: [VLM] Update compatibility with transformers 4.49
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Set patch_size in E5-V processor to work with the current transformers v4.48
Update Pixtral-HF processor to remain compatible with the change in huggingface/transformers#35122
Remove Pixtral-HF chat template as HF Hub has been updated with the correct chat template already cc @mgoin
Update MiniCPM-V

vllm.title: Quantization and MoE configs for GH200 machines
vllm.author: arvindsun
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The H200 configs work for the GH200 (it has 92GB gpu memory).

vllm.title: [ROCm][Kernel] Using the correct warp_size value
vllm.author: gshtras
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The code assumes WARP_SIZE to be equal to 32, based on the hard-coded values of shared int32_t shared_counts[32][8];
This is not the case on ROCm, which leads to half the array not being initialized

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Better FP8 supported defaults
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Avoid calling the blockwise CUTLASS kernels on L40s

vllm.title: [Misc][Easy] Remove the space from the file name
vllm.author: houseroad
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Need to remove the space from the empty space, otherwise, some codebase cannot support it well.

vllm.title: [Model] LoRA Support for Ultravox model
vllm.author: thedebugger
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This should also work w/ mistral models which also uses LlamaForCasualLM architecture re: here

vllm.title: Improve `TransformersModel` UX
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Improve user experience by warning instead of raising when Linear layer cannot be tensor parallelised.
(split from #12776)

vllm.title: [Misc] Remove duplicated DeepSeek V2/V3 model definition
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
It is trivial to represent DeepSeekV3 inside of the DeepSeekV2 model definition with a few additions, so let's remove deepseek_v3.py
You can see that "new" configs like scoring_func and topk_method are already present in DeepSeekV2 configs: https://huggingface.co/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V2/blob/main/co

vllm.title: [Misc] Improve error message for incorrect pynvml
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: after #12679 , incorrect pynvml will lead to runtime error. right now this error will be suppressed. we need to let it speak out so that users know what's happening, otherwise they will get a confusing error saying that No platform detected, vLLM is running on UnspecifiedPlatform.
